features: Rexona Men Cobalt Dry antiperspirant deodorant spray 150 ml.
The more you move, the more it protects.

48-hour protection against body odour and underarm wetness; also available as a 75-ml compressed deodorant spray. Lasts as long as the 150 ml variant, but with smaller packaging; also available as a 75-ml compressed deodorant spray. Lasts just as long as the 150 ml variant, but with smaller packaging.
description: Product Description The Rexona Men antiperspirant deodorant spray Cobalt Dry with its masculine fresh fragrance works proactively before odour can even occur. It provides reliable 48-hour protection against underarm wetness and body odour. Because thanks to the unique MotionSense technology, you don't have to worry about underarm wetness and odour. The more you move, the more it protects. Sounds crazy? But it is true. Anti-perspirant: no chance of sweat and body odour. The most important thing right at the beginning: sweating is something completely normal. This is due to the following reasons: high temperatures, sports activity, stress - in all these situations the body is cooled by sweating. Only 1% of the body sweat is under the armpits - but especially there, sweat odour and stains can become very unpleasant and annoying. Deodorants and antiperspirants help here. And this is how it works: the active ingredients in antiperspirants are distributed on the skin surface and form a kind of gel in combination with the body's own moisture. This lays over the sweat glands and thus provides 48 hours of reliable protection. Instructions for use: shake the Rexona anti-perspirant deodorant spray to activate the ingredients. Then spray evenly on the armpits in short strokes from a distance of 15 cm. You are ready to start the day fresh. For a sustainable future, the aluminium of the packaging of the deodorant is infinitely recyclable and has been produced with 100% green electricity. After emptying, please add to the recycling collection (in the EU). All Rexona products are designed to combat sweat problems and/or prevent body odour. Rexona is committed to learning as much as possible about the subject of sweating. All insights are then immediately incorporated into new, innovative product ideas to develop more effective products with a very special added value. So no matter whether you want to climb a mountain or just running to the bus, an important lecture or a date is coming up, a Rexona deodorant effectively combats all problems of perspiration. Rexona won't let you down Ingredients Butane, isobutane, propane, aluminium sesquichlorohydrate, PPG-14 butyl ether, cyclopentasiloxane, perfume, glycine, helianthus annuus seed oil, C12-15 alkyl benzoate, disteardimonium hectorite, calcium chloride, octyldodecanol, BHT, propylene carbonate, dimmate, ethicone. Sodium Starch Oocococtenylsuccinate, maltodextrin Directions Shake Rexona antiperspirant deodorant spray to activate ingredients. Then spray evenly on the armpits from a distance of 15 cm in short bumps. You are already ready to start the cool day. See more
